testcase.name: test_login_with_valid_credentials[invalid_login_wrong_password]

failure.message: AssertionError: Login flow failed assert False + where False = <bound method BusinessFunctions.complete_login_flow of <src.businessfunctions.business_functions.BusinessFunctions object at 0x000001CCBB5B8EC0>>('locked_out_user', 'wrong_password') + where <bound method BusinessFunctions.complete_login_flow of <src.businessfunctions.business_functions.BusinessFunctions object at 0x000001CCBB5B8EC0>> = <src.businessfunctions.business_functions.BusinessFunctions object at 0x000001CCBB5B8EC0>.complete_login_flow + and 'locked_out_user' = LoginRow(title='invalid_login_wrong_password', username='locked_out_user', password='wrong_password').username + and 'wrong_password' = LoginRow(title='invalid_login_wrong_password', username='locked_out_user', password='wrong_password').password

testcase.failure: src\tests\test_business_functions.py:20: in test_login_with_valid_credentials assert bf.complete_login_flow(row.username, row.password), "Login flow failed" E AssertionError: Login flow failed E assert False E + where False = <bound method BusinessFunctions.complete_login_flow of <src.businessfunctions.business_functions.BusinessFunctions object at 0x000001CCBB5B8EC0>>('locked_out_user', 'wrong_password') E + where <bound method BusinessFunctions.complete_login_flow of <src.businessfunctions.business_functions.BusinessFunctions object at 0x000001CCBB5B8EC0>> = <src.businessfunctions.business_functions.BusinessFunctions object at 0x000001CCBB5B8EC0>.complete_login_flow E + and 'locked_out_user' = LoginRow(title='invalid_login_wrong_password', username='locked_out_user', password='wrong_password').username E + and 'wrong_password' = LoginRow(title='invalid_login_wrong_password', username='locked_out_user', password='wrong_password').password
